name: Piperacillin And Tazobactam Injection IP
about: Piperacillin And Tazobactam Injection IP is a medication used to treat various bacterial infections. It is available in a dosage of 1.125gm and is administered through injection. This liquid medication is to be stored in a cool place and is of Indian origin. The dosage guidelines for this medication should be followed as per the doctors suggestion. This medication is available from our business as an exporter, supplier, and trader.

faq.a: Piperacillin And Tazobactam Injection IP is used to treat various bacterial infections.

faq.a: This medication should be stored in a cool place.
Piperacillin And Tazobactam Injection IP is of Indian origin.
